songs.title: Easy
feed: “Easy” by Stray Kids reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“Easy” by Stray Kids reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 42 spots to #1.
“Easy” by Stray Kids climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 42 spots to #1.
“Easy” by Stray Kids is the biggest percentage gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 611% to 583 points.
“Easy” by Stray Kids is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 198 sales units.
“Easy” by Stray Kids is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 355 streams units.
“Easy” by Stray Kids is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 514,066 total units.
